description: Resolve: review is not a core verb (self-merge model). Core deliverable verbs are claim/close (+unclaim/drop). Delivery (squash) moves to close.pre; teardown to close.post; gates/queues/forge are plugins that hold the task by rejecting close.pre while an open gate child exists, or by a synchronous close.pre command. Also fold the canonical 6-step plugin-invocation lifecycle into bl-2e26 §8 as a draft destined for final repo docs. Supersedes the bl-2a77 review.post squash placement and the bl-d66e review sequence.
title: Topic: drop the review verb — close-centric delivery + canonical plugin-invocation lifecycle
